activity_heatmap.description: Commits per day across all repos

learning_phases.observation: First month on GitHub. 4 repos created: prompt-optimizer, web, tarot-content-creator, DECLuTTER-AI. Heavy Codex-driven development on Netlify/Next.js. Already using Claude Code and Codex agents from day one.

learning_phases.phase: Rapid Tool Building - CLI and Games
learning_phases.observation: noise.sh (Go TUI) and focus.sh (Go TUI) - shift from web apps to terminal tools. lean-study-buddy-extension. Massive commit volume on noise.sh. Time-stamp commits show marathon sessions.

Peak creative output. Farm-to-Stars (100+ commits), CyberWitches (70+), EvoLab (50+), GameStory-Lab (60+). Simultaneously building games, CLI tools, generative art. Heavy Claude Code PRs and Cursor AI usage.
Slowed new repo creation. Focused on Print-OS (3D printing management) and voice-to-sculpture-app. Print-OS shows pivot toward ceramics/3D printing domain.
LifeOS monorepo (36 commits in one day) - ADHD-focused life management. apex-vault v4-v6 evolution. Print-OS solo operator roadmap.
Interpreted-Context-Methodology (ICM) - developing methodology paper. cerafica-site and creative-portfolio - building creative identity. Now creating frameworks, not just apps.

Liminal primary project (150+ commits). mcp-video full Python MCP server (276+ tests). GlazeLab ceramics glaze AI. DialectOS MCP translation. reverse-engineering methodology. PuenteWorks, Cerafica. Production-quality engineering across multiple domains.

concurrent_work.description: Repos active at the same time as key periods

insights: Account created 2025-09-07. First commit same day (prompt-optimizer). Zero ramp-up period - went straight to production apps with AI agents.
November 2025 was the creative supernova: 15 new repos, 979 commits, multiple games and tools built simultaneously. Commit timestamps show 12-16 hour sessions.
Language evolution: TypeScript (Sep 2025) -> Go (Oct 2025) -> Python (Dec 2025). By March 2026 all three active with clear domain assignments (TS=apps, Go=CLI, Python=AI/ML).

Domain evolution: SaaS tools (Sep) -> CLI tools and games (Oct-Nov) -> Creative/generative (Nov) -> 3D printing and ceramics (Dec) -> Personal OS (Jan) -> Frameworks and methodology (Feb) -> MCP ecosystem and AI engineering (Mar-Apr).
Uses AI agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor) as primary development tools from day one. PR titles like claude/review-codebase and codex/implement-feature appear consistently.
Time-stamp commits (10pm, 9am, midnight) indicate marathon coding sessions, often 12+ hours, especially during November 2025 sprint.
Liminal represents convergence of creative coding (Atelier/EvoLab), LLM integration (hydra-creative-agent), audio/aesthetic systems, ceramics (GlazeLab).
Cerafica bridges creative output (ceramics) and technology (e-commerce, AI glaze prediction).
49 repos in 7 months. Peak month November 2025 with 15 new repos and 979 commits.
atelier and liminal share the same commit history before 2026-03-20, confirming Liminal was renamed from Atelier.
Interpreted-Context-Methodology shows developer creating original frameworks for human-AI collaboration, not just building tools.
March 2026 is the most productive month by commit volume (1396 commits) driven by liminal, mcp-video, GlazeLab, DialectOS, and cerafica all active simultaneously.
The developer maintains active repos in 4+ languages simultaneously by March 2026, showing genuine polyglot capability rather than just tutorial-following.
